project_common.outline_style: 2px solid outline included in sprite dimensions

shared_attributes.features: short front legs, large eyes, thick tail

context.role: Death state sprite displayed after collision with obstacle
context.screen_position: Fixed at x=100px from left edge, y=0 (ground level)
context.usage_scenario: Displayed when player collides with Cactus or Pterodactyl, remains visible during game over screen

visual_specification.texture: pixel art, flat color, no gradients

animation.description: Single static frame showing death state with eyes closed or X-shaped eyes (optional)

visual_specification.details: Eyes closed or replaced with X symbols (optional), body in stopped position, conveys game over state clearly

relationships.shared_with: Same dimensions and color as player_idle, player_run, player_jump
relationships.differences_from: All other player states have eyes open, player_dead has eyes closed/X-ed, all other states are active, player_dead is static

explicit_negations: no additional colors beyond #535353 (optional #FF0000 for X eyes)
